title: Ross Pence Resume
text:
Computer Science and Software Engineering Major

208-671-3736 | rosspence14@gmail.com | LinkedIn Profile (Optional) | E-Portfolio (Optional)



April 2025 - Present Brigham Young University - Idaho, Rexburg, ID

Computer Science and Software Engineering Major
4.00 GPA at BYUI
Won third place at a BYU-I Hackathon as a team of two by writing a computer game in Unity using C#
Built Python projects using Tkinter, Math, Pygame, and Turtle
Created 3D models of car parts, drone parts, human and animal characters, desk organizers, laptop stands, and other objects using Blender and OnShape (CAD)
3D printed designed objects using an Ender 3 v2 Pro printer
Served as lead developer with 2 junior developers

April 2025 - Present Brigham Young University - Idaho, Rexburg, ID

AI/ML Minor
Engineered an end-to-end machine learning pipeline using Polars and Python, implementing and evaluating four predictive models to achieve 90% accuracy
Engineered a machine learning pipeline using Polars and Scikit-learn, implementing Random Forest and XGBoost ensembles to compare performance metrics and improve prediction accuracy





Competed as a programmer and driver of multiple teams’ robots at the 2022 VEX World Championship
Configured BetaFlight for drone motor control, transmitter/receiver communication, and FPV video systems (digital and analog)
Tuned PID controller gains, battery charge levels, joystick sensitivities, and flight mode selection via radio control transmitter




January 2026 - April 2026 PlaybookOps - Software Engineering Intern, Rexburg, Idaho

Full-Stack Developer
Architected and deployed a full-stack dynamic web application using HTML5, CSS3, and Node.js, integrating a SQL database for real-time data persistence
Collaborated with a cross-functional team of four to deliver high-quality project assets within an accelerated 3-month timeline

January 2026 - April 2026 Brigham Young University Idaho, Rexburg, Idaho

Teaching Assistant - Web Development
Evaluated and provided detailed feedback on 100+ student projects, ensuring adherence to modern web standards and clean code practices
Debugged complex student code, resolving technical blockers in HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript
